TestCase z34Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_y = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_y, t1.y, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.y = follow_case_y;
    // ------------------------------------
    // Defensive check for at least one element
    if (follow_case.n < 1) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    // Operation: set first element to -1e308 when it is greater
    if (follow_case.y[0] > -1e308) {
        follow_case.y[0] = -1e308;
    }
    return follow_case;
}
